# Advocate Satish Mor

Website: https://advocate-satish-mor.vercel.app

Description:
Advocate Satish Mor is a legal practitioner based in Chandigarh specializing in Criminal Law, Civil Litigation, Property Disputes, Bail Matters, and Punjab & Haryana High Court practice.

Primary Services:
- Criminal Defense
- Civil Litigation
- Property Disputes
- Bail Applications
- High Court Representation
- Legal Consultation

Target Location:
Chandigarh
Punjab
Haryana

Practice Areas:
- Criminal Law
- Civil Law
- Property Law
- High Court Matters
